mapper.insert: insert into order_detail(order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, quantity, total_fee, create_time, update_time) values (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{totalFee}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update order_detail
order_id = #{orderId},
product_id = #{productId},
product_name = #{productName},
product_image = #{productImage},
price = #{price},
quantity = #{quantity},
total_fee = #{totalFee},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
